name: Marinated Black-Eyed Peas (Little Rock)
recipeIngredient: 1 Garlic clove, crushed and left whole
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the peas and place them in a large bowl.
2. Add the remaining ingredients to the bowl.
3. Cover and refrigerate for at least 24 hours.
4. Remove the garlic before serving.
5. The marinated peas will keep, refrigerated, for up to 2 weeks.
